DEFENDANT AJAX TOCCO MAGNETHERMIC CORP.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Ajax Tocco Magnethermic Corp.'s motion for summary judgment and alternative motion for summary adjudication is denied. The court will consider plaintiffs' ex parte application for discovery at the same time as the hearing. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.
